title: CustomEnchants
description: Always wanted a sharpness of X (10) on your sword? Now you can!
body:
Always wanted a sharpness of 10 on your sword? Now you can!

CustomEnchants allow you to place higher enchantment levels on an item, for example Protection 5 or Sharpness 8. You can also easily customize the name/lore of the item (with color codes if you like).
